name: Unstable Coin
description: Unstable Coin (USDUC) is a satirical anti-stablecoin on Solana and one of the tokens that popularized the unstablecoin category in 2025. Launched on pump.fun, it flips the core promise of stablecoins on its head: instead of engineering price stability, USDUC embraces chaos and openly celebrates volatility.

The project presents itself as pure entertainment — a commentary on crypto's obsession with pegs and the illusion of stability. It disclaims any intrinsic value, utility or roadmap, and leans entirely on community, memes and speculative culture.
USDUC trades mainly on Solana DEXs such as PumpSwap and Meteora, with the deepest liquidity in the USDUC/SOL pair.

name: TurboUSD Unstablecoin
description: TurboUSD (₸USD) is the world's first unstablecoin, originally deployed on Base via the Mint.Club launchpad in October 2024 and relaunched in its final form as a Clanker token in July 2025. It was created to reject currency debasement while riding the growth of the stablecoin sector — taking the exact opposite position: a finite, deflationary and openly unstable asset with no peg.

Beyond the token, TurboUSD has grown into a full ecosystem: staking, an Artificial Monetary Intelligence (AMI) that manages an onchain treasury like an autonomous central bank, a real-world brand with physical products such as TurboX Energy, and a cultural movement built around the motto "Embrace the Unstable".
₸USD has a fixed maximum supply of 100 billion tokens and trades on Uniswap on Base, with its supply becoming increasingly deflationary through burns.

name: Unstable Tether
description: Unstable Tether (USDUT) is a Solana memecoin that parodies Tether (USDT), the largest stablecoin in crypto. Launched on pump.fun in August 2025, it borrows the visual language of the world's most traded digital dollar and strips away the only thing that made it useful: the peg.
Like most unstablecoins, USDUT is a satirical, community-driven token with no reserves, no backing and no price target. It trades primarily against SOL on PumpSwap.

name: Unstable States Dollar
description: Unstable States Dollar (USD) takes the parody one step further: instead of mocking a stablecoin, it mocks the United States dollar itself — ticker included. Launched on Solana through the BONK.fun launchpad in August 2025, it argues that the "real" dollar is just as unstable, only slower about it.
USD is a satirical community token with no peg and no backing. It trades against SOL on Raydium.
